data.title: dso:onboarding: does not add .tickets-tracker/ or .ui-discovery-cache/ to .prettierignore
data.description:
## Problem

When onboarding a project that uses Prettier, the dso:onboarding skill does not account for .tickets-tracker/ or .ui-discovery-cache/ directories in the project's .prettierignore file. These directories contain JSON event files and cache data that should not be formatted by Prettier.

## Expected Behavior

dso:onboarding should add .tickets-tracker/ and .ui-discovery-cache/ to .prettierignore (and similar ignore files) during project setup.

## Actual Behavior

These directories are not mentioned in .prettierignore, causing Prettier to attempt formatting on ticket event files and UI discovery cache files.

## Severity

P3 — formatting noise on infrastructure files.
